name: octo-apm-login-auth-flow
description: Trace Explorer query for shop and admin login, session, and auth checks. Use the TraceId to inspect user action logs and DB writes in Log Analytics.
queryText: show (traces) TraceStatus as Status, TraceFirstSpanStartTime as "Start Time", TraceId, ServiceName as Service, OperationName as Operation, TraceDuration as Duration, ErrorCount as "Span Errors" where ServiceName in ('octo-drone-shop','octo-drone-shop-oke','enterprise-crm-portal','enterprise-crm-portal-oke') and (OperationName like '%login%' or OperationName like '%auth%' or OperationName like '%session%')
